sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15905" key="a)rxĭ" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρχῐ-</orth>, insep. Prefix, <sense id="n15905.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">like</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀρχε-</ref></xr>, from the same Root as <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄρχω, ἀρχός.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
